title: Python Data Validation Script Generator
scenario: Generate a Python script that validates a JSON object against a predefined schema. The schema should have the following properties: `name` (string), `age` (integer), and `address` (object with `street`, `city`, and `state` properties). The script should raise a ValueError if the JSON object does not match the schema. The script should be under 50 lines of code.
constraints: Must be under 50 lines of code
Must raise a ValueError if the JSON object does not match the schema

evaluationCriteria.description: Check if the script adheres to the line limit and raises a ValueError for invalid JSON objects.
Verify that the script has correct Python syntax.
Check if the script correctly validates the JSON object against the schema.
